name: Aegis Aurora
explicitMods: Recover Energy Shield equal to 2% of Armour when you Block
17% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
flavourText: Born from the marriage of ice and sky,
the aurora evokes both awe and power.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports attack skills that aren't triggered.
explicitMods:
Gain 1 Momentum when you Use a Supported Skill
Gain 1 Momentum every 0.70 seconds while Channelling a Supported Skill
Lose all Momentum if you Move
Supported Skills have 15% increased Attack Speed per Momentum

When you reach 3 Momentum, lose all Momentum and gain
Swiftness for 1.5 seconds
Swiftness grants 15% increased Movement Speed per Momentum lost
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Warped Timepiece
flavourText: As you have lived, so you shall die
forever trying to keep up with me.
Your blood on these hands of mine
forever makes me the public enemy.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Fire, Travel, Blink

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving a trail of burning ground. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: Deals 1738.6 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a wall of fire for a duration, which deals burning damage to everything in its area. Each enemy that enters the wall also receives a secondary burning debuff which persists for a short duration after leaving the wall. Any projectiles fired through the wall by you and allies deal added fire damage and apply the wall's secondary debuff on hit.
explicitMods: Deals 679.9 Base Fire Damage per second
Secondary Debuff Deals 2266.4 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
Maximum 3 Flame Walls at a time
Projectiles which pass through the wall deal 78 to 117 Added Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.
explicitMods: Buff grants +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while holding a Shield
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell skill will track damage you take, and be triggered when the total damage taken reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.
explicitMods: This Gem can only Support Skill Gems requiring Level 70 or lower
Trigger Supported Spells when you take 3272 total Damage from Hits

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Fire, Physical, Guard

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. When the buff expires or is depleted, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken from the buff. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to 10% of your Armour, up to a maximum of 5000
Reflects 3000% of Damage taken from Buff as Fire Damage when Buff expires or is depleted
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

implicitMods: Adds 4 to 10 Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks

socketedItems.secDescrText: Wave your wand to create a hovering kinetic projectile. After a short duration, the projectile is fired at an enemy, dealing area damage on impact and chaining to further targets. Using this attack again will reset the duration for all hovering projectiles. Multiple projectiles fired in sequence will attempt to target different enemies. Cannot be directly used by traps or mines.
explicitMods: Increases and Reductions to Spell Damage also apply to Attack Damage from this Skill at 150% of their value
Projectiles deal 8% more Damage per previous Projectile fired in sequence

she surpassed her master in pure malevolence.
